data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Fix correctly removes 'in_action' from isPhaseFilter in both knots-backend.ts and beads-backend.ts, preventing includeDescendantsOfQueueParents from running on the Active view. This stops shipped/terminal beats from surfacing in Active just because they have a queued ancestor. Tests updated to assert correct behavior. Minimal, well-scoped change with no regressions.
